rationale: Strong breadth across aerospace, HDD, and robotics with correct mitigation framing (notch filters, gain/phase margin), but asserts specific historical incidents (Falcon 9 GTO, Ariane, N-1) as control-structure-interaction cases without sources or confidence qualifiers, which a domain expert would flag.
rubric_evidence: caused the Falcon 9 GTO mission anomalies and contributed to early Ariane and N-1 difficulties
The fix is always frequency-domain: identify the mechanical mode, then add notch filters
